Handout: Prevent Respiratory Illness 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this handout to share information about everyday actions people can take to stay healthy and reduce their risk of respiratory illness.

Respiratory Illnesses 
Respiratory illnesses affect the lungs and airways. Get information on common causes, prevention actions, and current levels of illness in your community.
